summary: Dashboard renders core functionality correctly with proper mobile layout, but violates brand palette consistency by using generic UI colors instead of the required diner aesthetic palette.

violations.description: Dashboard uses generic neutral colors (white/gray backgrounds, standard text colors) instead of the required diner palette. Should use cream surface (#fff8ea) for cards and teal (#9fd8d2) or cream (#fff8ea) primary canvas per M.universal.1.

The 'Resend verification email' CTA button uses pink color but appears to be a generic pink implementation rather than the specified diner button treatment with proper pink (#ffb3c7), hard shadow, and styling.

actions: Apply diner palette to authenticated dashboard surfaces - use cream (#fff8ea) for card backgrounds and proper canvas colors
Implement proper .diner-button styling for the verification email CTA with specified pink (#ffb3c7), borders, and hard shadows
Ensure brand palette consistency between public marketing surfaces and authenticated dashboard experience
